content_body: This is such a wonderful cabin with beautiful views! We visited with a group of family, who gets together every year for a motorcycle trip. Celtic Clouds was the perfect "home base" for enjoying the mountain roads. Blue Ridge is a cute, little town to explore. The cabin was everything we anticipated and more. Everything was clean and carefully thought out. Thank you for sharing it with us!
title: Celtic Clouds was Everything We Anticipated and More!
